name: Garden Salad Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a pizza stone on the lowest rack of the oven. Preheat to 400°F.
2. If using a metal pan instead, do not preheat the pan.
3. Toss the vegetables with oil and vinegar.
4. Cover 2 12-inch pizza shells with cheese (leaving a 1/4 inch rim).
5. Sprinkle the vegetable mixture over the cheese.
6. Slide the pizzas onto the pizza stone.
7. Bake for 15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown. MAKES 2 MEDIUM PIZZAS, 8 SLICES EACH.
Per slice: 177 calories, 21 grams carbohydrates, 6 grams protein, 1 gram fiber, 7.6 grams fat (2 grams saturated), 268 milligrams sodium.
